quoteFirst: The _Chauncey_, one of our small, old-type destroyers, was rammed and sunk by the steamship _Rose_ near Gibraltar at
title: Our Navy at war
author: Daniels, Josephus, 1862-1948

quoteLast: the Twelfth Flotilla, farther north, sighted six Kaiser battleships and attacked them.
title: Days to Remember: The British Empire in the Great War
author: Buchan, John, 1875-1940; Newbolt, Henry John, Sir, 1862-1938
